name: HWP_PRED_ATTR_RESULTS_V
query: SELECT hdmr.enterprise_id, hdmr.process_id, hdmr.person_id, hdmr.assignment_id, least(hdmr.pred_value * nvl(hmb.correction_value,1),1) is_emp_prob FROM hwp_data_mining_process hdmp, hwp_data_mining_results hdmr, hwp_models_b hmb WHERE hdmp.model_code = 'HWP_ATTR_MODEL' AND hdmr.process_id = hdmp.process_id AND hdmp.model_code = hmb.model_code
